top_signals.title: Wayve Files for Share Sale on London Bourse’s New Private Market
top_signals.summary: Autonomous driving software company Wayve Technologies Ltd. has filed to sell shares on the London Stock Exchange’s new Private Securities Market, the first major company to test the novel system.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Agents of change − speech by Sarah Breeden
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Eni and Mercuria to Form Global Commodities Trading Venture
top_signals.summary: Italian oil company Eni SpA and commodities merchant Mercuria Energy Group Ltd. signed an agreement to expand their global trading footprint by forming a joint venture.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Employers who laid off workers citing AI are already starting to regret it
top_signals.summary: Companies are realizing artificial intelligence can't do everything after all, prompting them to rehire employees to grow their businesses
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: MOL, IBM Japan Launch AI Platform for Vessel Operations
top_signals.summary: Mitsui O.S.K. Lines (MOL) and IBM Japan have jointly developed an artificial intelligence (AI)-powered platform designed to support decision-making in vessel operations by integrating operational, weather and geopolitical information.The platform…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: The cost of falling behind on climate adaptation.
